title: REGIONAL TRANSIT AUTHORITY
doc_html:
CHAPTER 15.  REGIONAL TRANSIT AUTHORITY

§1651.  Short title

The Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the Regional Transit Authority Act of 1979.  

Added by Acts 1979, No. 439, §1, eff. Aug. 1, 1979.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 15.  REGIONAL TRANSIT AUTHORITY
§1651.  Short title
The Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the Regional Transit Authority Act of 1979.
Added by Acts 1979, No. 439, §1, eff. Aug. 1, 1979.
